name: Spanish Rice
recipeIngredient: 2 cups salt-free or low-salt tomato juice or V8
1 tablespoon Tuong Ot Sriracha (serrano chili sauce by Huy Fong Foods)
1/4 cup finely chopped green bell pepper (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the rice at least four times using cold water, gently stirring it and discarding the water each time.
2. In a rice cooker or pot, combine the rinsed rice, tomato juice or V8, water, onions, oregano, cumin, garlic powder, bullion concentrate, and Sriracha sauce.
3. Bring to a boil uncovered, then cover and cook on low heat until all liquid is absorbed and the rice is tender (at least 30 minutes for brown rice).
4. Stir in the chopped green bell pepper and celery if desired, allowing them to absorb the flavors during cooking.
Note: Adjust water proportions as needed based on your rice cooker or pot size, ensuring the rice remains covered while cooking.
